query: how to configure mutual TLS authentication between microservices in Kubernetes

chosen.content_snippet:
Contents

# Mutual TLS Migration

4 minute read[page test](https://github.com/istio/istio.io/tree/master/README.md#testing-document-content "An automated test is available for this page. Click for details.") 5

This task shows how to ensure your workloads only communicate using mutual TLS as they are migrated to
Istio.

Istio automatically configures workload sidecars to use [mutual TLS](https://istio.io/latest/docs/tasks/security/authentication/authn-policy/#auto-mutual-tls) when calling other

preference_rationale: Rank 4 (https://istio.io/latest/docs/tasks/security/authentication/mtls-migration/) preferred over Rank 2 (https://www.appviewx.com/blogs/why-mutual-tls-mtls-is-critical-for-securing-microservices-communications-in-a-service-mesh/) because the Istio page is official documentation with authority_score=1.0 and query_relevance_score=1.0, containing 10 code blocks with PeerAuthentication YAML policies for STRICT mTLS enforcement between microservices, whereas the AppViewX blog has authority_score=0.4, query_relevance_score=0.4, zero code blocks, and no step-by-step configuration instructions.
